creator: dev2@heesakkers.info
text:
(In reply to Gleb Smirnoff from comment #5)
> QT != GUI, gpsbabel is still a command line tool.

I'm aware of that, but just to build gpsbabel 1.5.1 I had to install or see getting pulled in:
qt4-xml-4.8.6
qt4-network-4.8.6
qt4-xmlpatterns-4.8.6
qt4-svg-4.8.6
qt4-opengl-4.8.6
qt4-script-4.8.6
qt4-sql-4.8.6
gstreamer-0.10.36_2
orc-0.4.19_2
qt4-doc-4.8.6
qt4-clucene-4.8.6
sqlite3-3.8.4.3
qt4-declarative-4.8.6
gstreamer-plugins-0.10.36_4,3
qt4-sqlite-plugin-4.8.6
qt4-webkit-4.8.6
qt4-help-4.8.6
qt4-assistant-4.8.6
qt4-linguist-4.8.6
qt4-qmake-4.8.6

The ldd output nearly triples in linecount compared to version 1.4.4.

I'm sure they had good reason, but I can't pretend to like it.

Anyway, I'll attach another patch that, as far as I'm concerned, is OK to be committed.
